title: Sweet Kenyan Rhubarb Tagine
description: A unique blend of traditional Kenyan spices and sweet rhubarb in a slow-cooked tagine. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the bottom of the tagine.
Add the chopped sweet potatoes and cook until they start to brown.
Add the rhubarb, tagine spice blend, and honey to the tagine.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve the sweet potatoes and rhubarb warm, topped with additional tagine spice blend if desired.
